steps.name: implement_tarflow
steps.acceptance: TarFlow model class in src/model.py with forward pass verified on single batch

steps.name: implement_training
steps.acceptance: Training loop in src/train.py with MLE loss, verified loss decreases on small run

steps.name: diagnostic
steps.acceptance: Diagnostic Report written with baseline analysis and root cause identified

result.root_cause: affine scale collapse via log_scale chaining

steps.name: plan
steps.acceptance: OPTIMIZE Plan Sub-report approved by Postdoc

steps.name: angle_sanity
steps.acceptance: SANITY angle completed: validation run + sweep + full run

result.outcome: shift collapse: loss=0.919 plateau, z.std=0.0007, model=raw gaussian baseline

steps.name: angle_heuristics
steps.acceptance: HEURISTICS angle completed or skipped with justification

result.method: ActNorm (Kingma & Dhariwal 2018) after each block, shift_only=False
result.outcome: ActNorm scale collapse: valid_fraction=0 all molecules, cumulative inverse contraction=0.0013

steps.name: angle_scale
steps.acceptance: SCALE angle completed or skipped with justification

result.justification: Collapse is architectural (log_det exploitation), not capacity-limited. Larger model will produce same collapse faster.

steps.name: final_evaluation
steps.acceptance: Per-molecule evaluation metrics computed, all visualizations generated

steps.name: final_report
steps.acceptance: Final Experiment Report submitted with all required sections

steps.name: source_integration
steps.acceptance: No .py files in experiment dir; src/ reflects current practice

steps.name: merge_and_tag
steps.acceptance: Merged to main with tag hyp_002; pre-merge checks pass
